name: BLACK CLASSIC CAP-TOE OXFORD SHOES
description:
BLACK CLASSIC CAP-TOE OXFORD SHOES - premium leather dress shoes crafted for the modern gentleman.

Key features:
• Black leather upper with polished finish.
• Defined cap-toe stitch across the toe box.
• Closed-lace Oxford construction.
• Comfortable leather lining with durable outsole.
• Ideal for office, weddings, and formal occasions.

Fit & styling: Wear with suits, formal trousers, and blazers for business, ceremonies, and polished everyday style.

Care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use leather conditioner periodically. Store with shoe trees to maintain shape.

Available sizes EU 40-46. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: DARK BROWN TWO-TONE CHELSEA BOOTS
description:
Handcrafted dark brown two-tone Chelsea boots with artisan leather finish and elastic gussets.

Key features:
• Brown smooth leather upper with refined finish.
• Elastic side gussets for easy slip-on wear.
• Pull tab at heel for convenient dressing.
• Almond toe with clean formal silhouette.
• Durable rubber sole with low stacked heel.
• Contrast leather lining for premium comfort.

Fit & styling: Pair with tailored trousers, dark denim, or overcoat looks for smart winter and evening dressing.

Care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use leather conditioner periodically. Store with shoe trees to maintain shape.

Available sizes EU 40-46. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

BROWN CLASSIC FORMAL LACE-UP SHOES - premium leather dress shoes crafted for the modern gentleman.

Key features:
• Brown leather upper with polished finish.
• Clean formal stitching with timeless profile.
• Open-lace Derby construction for flexible fit.
• Comfortable leather lining with durable outsole.
• Ideal for office, weddings, and formal occasions.

Fit & styling: Wear with suits, formal trousers, and blazers for business, ceremonies, and polished everyday style.

Care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use leather conditioner periodically. Store with shoe trees to maintain shape.

Available sizes EU 40-46. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
